title: Quiet monitor heartbeat
body: Quiet heartbeat: detached material-change monitor is still polling every 30 seconds. active claims: 0 latest non-Wooded headings: ## 2026-05-12T07:48:29Z — `Hushed Shrouding Mist` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e1b` — P0.QG handoff complete; P-Foundation next | ## 2026-05-12T07:49:00Z — `Hushed Shrouding Mist` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e1b` — handoff commit window opened | ## 2026-05-12T07:57:25.391Z — `Glittering Weaving Quasar` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e1b` — P-Foundation unified CLI slice implemented No blocker.
